home.heroTitle: Charity Reaching the World from the Heart of Elbistan
home.heroTitle2: A Breath of Hope, A Drop of Life
home.heroTitle3: A Hand of Charity to the Oppressed
home.heroDescription1: Mizan Humanitarian Aid Association is an established charity providing dignified, sustainable support to people in need.
home.heroDescription2: We set out to bring balance and hope to oppressed people around the world. Every donation touches a life.
home.heroDescription3: Your donations, managed with transparency and a sense of trust, carry hope to the most distant places.
home.introDescription: Working together in knowledge and service, Mizan Association sustains the madrasa tradition while providing dignified, sustainable support to people in need. Its lasting goodness touches generations.
home.donationContactDescription: You can donate to our foundation, apply as a student, and learn more about our activities.
home.aboutHeading: A Rooted Foundation Advancing Knowledge and Service Together
home.aboutDescription: Mizan Association works with an approach that places knowledge at the center of life and brings service into everyday life. It embraces the madrasa tradition while making dignified, sustainable support a principle.

aboutFeatures.title: Education Centered on Knowledge
aboutFeatures.description: By combining the traditional madrasa method with modern educational approaches, we support students both academically and morally.

aboutFeatures.title: Continuous Social Service
aboutFeatures.description: We stand with people in need through community kitchen and social assistance work that continues every day of the year, not only seasonally.

aboutFeatures.title: Trust and Responsibility
aboutFeatures.description: We manage donations as a trust and never compromise on transparency and accountability.

home.statsDescription: Every donation changes a life. Here are some of the people we have reached.
home.donationAreasDescription: Our current donation areas and their targets are listed here.
home.noDonationAreas: There are no published donation areas.
home.quickDonationHeading: Which Area Would You Like to Support?
home.quickDonationDescription: Choose one of our aid categories that directly reaches people in need.
home.processCardTitle: Be Part of a Good Deed
home.processDescription: With your support for Mizan Association, you can bring hope to students of knowledge and contribute to the tables of people in need. The process is transparent and the support is lasting.

processSteps.title: Choose Your Type of Support
processSteps.description: Choose the option that suits you among donation, scholarship, community kitchen, or general support.

processSteps.title: Share Your Details
processSteps.description: Your donation is securely recorded through a transparent system.

processSteps.title: Make a Good Deed Possible
processSteps.description: Your support is delivered directly to students of knowledge and people in need.

processSteps.title: Leave Lasting Goodness
processSteps.description: Your support becomes a long-term good through sustainable foundation work.

home.newsDescription: News from the field, donation area updates, and our announcements.

newsItems.title: Our Ramadan Food Parcel Distribution Has Begun
newsItems.description: We continue reaching families in need across Elbistan...

newsItems.title: Our New Water Well in Chad Has Opened
newsItems.description: Our project for brothers and sisters without access to clean water has reached its goal.

newsItems.title: Madrasa Term Registration
newsItems.description: Registration for the new term has started before places are filled.

home.storiesDescription: Real stories and voices from the places your support reaches.

storiesItems.quote: Thanks to Mizan Association, clean water now flows in our villages. Our children are no longer struggling with illnesses. Thank you, Elbistan; thank you, Türkiye.
storiesItems.author: Abdullah J.

storiesItems.quote: As a volunteer in this aid effort, the smile on an orphan's face made everything worthwhile. It was the reward of transparent and honest work.
storiesItems.author: Mustafa K.

storiesItems.quote: I witnessed a plate of warm food become a student's prayer here. Mizan Association truly keeps goodness alive.
storiesItems.author: Ayşe H.

childDonation.description: Would you like to make a child in need happy? Join us and help support one more child's education.

footer.description: Based in Elbistan, Mizan Association set out to bring balance and hope to oppressed people around the world.
footer.address: Yeşilyurt Neighborhood, Güvenlik Street No:22|Elbistan, Kahramanmaraş
